1762: export async function runWorkspaceDeploymentInlineWithRetries(
1763:   env: Env,
1764:   workspaceId: string,
1765:   deploymentId: string,
1766:   maxCycles = 8
1767: ): Promise<void> {
1768:   async function recoverInlineRunningDeployment(): Promise<boolean> {
1769:     const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1770:     if (!latest || latest.status !== 'running') {
1771:       return false;
1772:     }
1773: 
1774:     if (latest.cancelRequestedAt) {
1775:       return false;
1776:     }
1777: 
1778:     if (latest.attemptCount > latest.maxRetries) {
1779:       return false;
1780:     }
1781: 
1782:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'queued', {
1783:       workspaceId,
1784:       startedAt: null,
1785:       finishedAt: null,
1786:       errorCode: 'retry_scheduled',
1787:       errorMessage: 'Recovered inline deployment retry after transient failure',
1788:     });
1789:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1790:       workspaceId,
1791:       deploymentId,
1792:       eventType: 'deployment_retry_scheduled',
1793:       payload: { attemptCount: latest.attemptCount, maxRetries: latest.maxRetries, recoveredInline: true },
1794:     });
1795:     return true;
1796:   }
1797: 
1798:   for (let cycle = 0; cycle < maxCycles; cycle += 1) {
1799:     let retryableErrorRaised = false;
1800:     try {
1801:       await processWorkspaceDeployment(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1802:     } catch (error) {
1803:       if (error instanceof QueueRetryError && /cancel requested while running/i.test(error.message)) {
1804:         if (cycle < maxCycles - 1) {
1805:           await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, 1000));
1806:           continue;
1807:         }
1808:         return;
1809:       }
1810: 
1811:       if (error instanceof QueueRetryError && /already running; defer redelivery/i.test(error.message)) {
1812:         return;
1813:       }
1814: 
1815:       if (shouldRetryWorkspaceDeploymentError(error)) {
1816:         retryableErrorRaised = true;
1817:         try {
1818:           const recovered = await recoverInlineRunningDeployment();
1819:           if (recovered) {
1820:             continue;
1821:           }
1822:         } catch {
1823:           // Best-effort inline recovery only.
1824:         }
1825:       }
1826:     }
1827: 
1828:     const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1829:     if (!latest) {
1830:       return;
1831:     }
1832:     if (latest.status !== 'queued') {
1833:       return;
1834:     }
1835:     if (retryableErrorRaised) {
1836:       continue;
1837:     }
1838:     if (latest.error?.code !== 'retry_scheduled') {
1839:       return;
1840:     }
1841:   }
1842: }
1843:

1845:   env: Env,
1846:   workspaceId: string,
1847:   deploymentId: string
1848: ): Promise<{ updated: boolean; deployment: Awaited<ReturnType<typeof getWorkspaceDeployment>> }> {
1849:   const result = await requestWorkspaceDeploymentCancel(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);

<content>520:           const concurrent = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, created.deployment.id);

522:             return jsonResponse({ deployment: concurrent }, 200);

525:           throw new Error('Provider precheck failed but deployment record was not available for response');
526:         }

528:         const clearClaim = await env.DB
529:           .prepare(
530:             `UPDATE workspace_deployments
531:              SET error_code = NULL,
532:                  error_message = NULL,
533:                  updated_at = ?
534:              WHERE id = ?
535:                AND workspace_id = ?
536:                AND status = 'queued'
537:                AND error_code = 'provider_precheck_running'
538:                AND updated_at = ?`
539:           )
540:           .bind(new Date().toISOString(), created.deployment.id, workspaceId, claimTime)
541:           .run();
542: 
543:         if ((clearClaim.meta?.changes ?? 0) === 0) {
544:           const concurrent = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, created.deployment.id);
545:           if (concurrent) {
546:             return jsonResponse({ deployment: concurrent }, 200);
547:           }
548:         }
549: 
550:         await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
551:           workspaceId,
552:           deploymentId: created.deployment.id,
553:           eventType: 'deployment_provider_precheck_passed',
554:           payload: {
555:             checks: precheckChecks,
556:           },
557:         });
558:       }
559:     }
560: 
561:     const latestDeployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, created.deployment.id);
562:     const deploymentForQueue = latestDeployment ?? created.deployment;
563: 
564:     if (deploymentForQueue.status === 'queued') {
565:       const hasEnqueuedEvent = await hasWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(
566:         env.DB,
567:         workspaceId,
568:         deploymentForQueue.id,
569:         'deployment_enqueued'
570:       );
571:       const shouldRecoverQueued = created.reused && deploymentForQueue.error?.code === 'retry_scheduled';
572:       const hasRecoveredReenqueue = shouldRecoverQueued
573:         ? await hasWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentForQueue.id, 'deployment_reenqueue_recovered')
574:         : false;
575: 
576:       if (!hasEnqueuedEvent || (shouldRecoverQueued && !hasRecoveredReenqueue)) {
577:         if (env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOYS_QUEUE) {
578:           await env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOYS_QUEUE.send(
579:             createWorkspaceDeploymentQueueMessage(workspaceId, deploymentForQueue.id)
580:           );
581:         } else if (ctx) {
582:           ctx.waitUntil(
583:             runWorkspaceDeploymentInlineWithRetries(env, workspaceId, deploymentForQueue.id, deploymentForQueue.maxRetries + 1)
584:           );
585:         }
586: 
587:         await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
588:           workspaceId,
589:           deploymentId: deploymentForQueue.id,
590:           eventType: 'deployment_enqueued',
591:           payload: {
592:             mode: env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOYS_QUEUE ? 'queue' : 'inline',
593:             reused: created.reused,
594:           },
595:         });
596: 
597:         if (shouldRecoverQueued && !hasRecoveredReenqueue) {
598:           await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
599:             workspaceId,
600:             deploymentId: deploymentForQueue.id,
601:             eventType: 'deployment_reenqueue_recovered',

603:               reason: 'retry_scheduled_replay',
604:             },
605:           });
606:         }

609: 
610:     return jsonResponse({ deployment: deploymentForQueue }, created.reused ? 200 : 202);
611:   } catch (error) {

619:       );

621: 
622:     if (error instanceof SyntaxError) {

624:     }
625:

627:     return jsonResponse({ error: `Failed to create workspace deployment: ${message}` }, 500);
628:   }
629: }

631: export async function handleWorkspaceDeploymentPreflight(
632:   workspaceId: string,
633:   request: Request,
634:   env: Env
635: ): Promise<Response> {
636:   const enabled = await ensureWorkspaceDeployEnabled(env);
637:   if (enabled) {
638:     return enabled;
639:   }
640: 
641:   const workspaceCheck = await ensureWorkspaceReady(env, workspaceId);
642:   if (workspaceCheck) {
643:     return workspaceCheck;
644:   }
645: 
646:   let payload: Record<string, unknown> = {};
647:   try {
648:     const raw = await request.text();
649:     if (raw.trim()) {
650:       const parsed = JSON.parse(raw) as unknown;
651:       if (!parsed || typeof parsed !== 'object' || Array.isArray(parsed)) {
652:         return jsonResponse({ error: 'Request body must be a JSON object' }, 400);
653:       }
654:       payload = parsed as Record<string, unknown>;
655:     }
656:   } catch {
657:     return jsonResponse({ error: 'Invalid JSON body' }, 400);
658:   }
659: 
660:   const validation =
661:     payload.validation && typeof payload.validation === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.validation)
662:       ? (payload.validation as Record<string, unknown>)
663:       : {};
664:   const autoFix =
665:     payload.autoFix && typeof payload.autoFix === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.autoFix)
666:       ? (payload.autoFix as Record<string, unknown>)
667:       : {};
668:   const deploy =
669:     payload.deploy && typeof payload.deploy === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.deploy)
670:       ? (payload.deploy as Record<string, unknown>)
671:       : {};
672:   const providerInput = typeof payload.provider === 'string' ? payload.provider.trim() : '';
673:   const providerConfigError = getWorkspaceDeployProviderConfigError(env);
674:   if (!providerInput && providerConfigError) {
675:     return jsonResponse(
676:       {
677:         preflight: {
678:           ok: false,
679:           toolchain: null,
680:           checks: [{ code: 'provider_config_invalid', ok: false, details: providerConfigError }],
681:           remediations: [],
682:         },
683:         nextAction: 'Set WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PROVIDER to simulated or cloudflare_workers_assets and retry preflight.',
684:       },
685:       200
686:     );
687:   }
688:   if (providerInput && providerInput !== 'simulated' && providerInput !== 'cloudflare_workers_assets') {
689:     return jsonResponse(
690:       {
691:         preflight: {
692:           ok: false,
693:           toolchain: null,
694:           checks: [{ code: 'unsupported_deploy_provider', ok: false, details: `Unsupported provider: ${providerInput}` }],
695:           remediations: [],
696:         },
697:         nextAction: 'Use provider=cloudflare_workers_assets or provider=simulated.',
698:       },
699:       200
700:     );
701:   }
702:   const provider = getWorkspaceDeployProviderName(providerInput || undefined, env);
703:   const outputDir = parseDeployOutputDir(deploy.outputDir);
704: 
705:   if (provider === 'cloudflare_workers_assets' && (!outputDir || !isSafeRelativeOutputDir(outputDir))) {
706:     return jsonResponse(
707:       {
708:         preflight: {
709:           ok: false,
710:           toolchain: null,
711:           checks: [
712:             {
713:               code: 'provider_invalid_output_dir',
714:               ok: false,
715:               details: 'deploy.outputDir is required and must be a safe relative directory',
716:             },
717:           ],
718:           remediations: [],
719:         },
720:         nextAction: 'Set deploy.outputDir to your static build output directory and retry preflight.',
721:       },
722:       200
723:     );
724:   }
725:   const runBuildIfPresent = parseBoolean(validation.runBuildIfPresent, true);
726:   const runTestsIfPresent = parseBoolean(validation.runTestsIfPresent, true);
727:   const rehydrateBaseline = parseBoolean(autoFix.rehydrateBaseline, false);
728:   const bootstrapToolchain = parseBoolean(autoFix.bootstrapToolchain, false);
729: 
730:   try {
731:     const preflight = await runWorkspaceDeploymentPreflight(env, workspaceId, {
732:       runBuildIfPresent,
733:       runTestsIfPresent,
734:       rehydrateBaseline,
735:       bootstrapToolchain,
736:       provider,
737:       outputDir,
738:     });
739: 
740:     if (provider === 'cloudflare_workers_assets') {
741:       try {
742:         const providerChecks = await createWorkspaceDeployProvider(provider, env).precheck();
743:         preflight.checks.push(...providerChecks);
744:       } catch (error) {
745:         const providerError = normalizeProviderError(error);
746:         preflight.checks.push({ code: providerError.code, ok: false, details: providerError.message });
747:       }
748:       preflight.ok = preflight.checks.every((check) => check.ok);
749:     }
750: 
751:     const failedCheck = preflight.checks.find((check) => !check.ok);
752:     const nextAction = failedCheck
753:       ? failedCheck.code === 'validation_tooling'
754:         ? 'Disable build/test validation or install the detected package manager in the sandbox runtime image.'
755:         : failedCheck.code === 'git_baseline'
756:           ? 'Reset workspace to rebuild git baseline and retry deploy.'
757:           : failedCheck.code === 'secret_scan'
758:             ? 'Remove sensitive files from workspace before deploying.'
759:             : failedCheck.code === 'toolchain_detect'
760:               ? 'Fix package.json/lockfile metadata and retry preflight.'
761:               : failedCheck.code === 'toolchain_bootstrap'
762:                 ? 'Enable auto-fix bootstrap or use a sandbox image with corepack support.'
763:                 : failedCheck.code === 'project_root'
764:                   ? 'Set workspace source project root to a safe relative path and retry preflight.'
765:                   : failedCheck.code === 'provider_invalid_output_dir'
766:                     ? 'Set deploy.outputDir to a valid static build output directory and retry preflight.'
767:                     : failedCheck.code === 'provider_auth_failed'
768:                       ? 'Verify Cloudflare account credentials in worker env and retry preflight.'
769:                       : failedCheck.code === 'provider_scope_missing'
770:                         ? 'Grant required Cloudflare token scopes and retry preflight.'
771:                         : failedCheck.code === 'provider_project_not_found'
772:                           ? 'Set WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PROJECT_NAME to a valid Workers project and retry preflight.'
773:                           : failedCheck.code === 'provider_rate_limited'
774:                             ? 'Wait for provider rate limits to reset and retry preflight.'
775:             : null
776:       : null;
777:     return jsonResponse({ preflight, nextAction });
778:   } catch (error) {
779:     const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
780:     return jsonResponse(
781:       {
782:         preflight: {
783:           ok: false,
784:           toolchain: null,
785:           checks: [{ code: 'internal_error', ok: false, details: message }],
786:           remediations: [],
787:         },
788:       },
789:       500
790:     );
791:   }
792: }
793: 
794: export async function handleGetWorkspaceDeployment(
795:   workspaceId: string,
796:   deploymentId: string,
797:   env: Env
798: ): Promise<Response> {
799:   const workspaceMissing = await ensureWorkspaceExists(env, workspaceId);
800:   if (workspaceMissing) {
801:     return workspaceMissing;
802:   }
803: 
804:   const deployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
805:   if (!deployment) {
806:     return jsonResponse({ error: 'Deployment not found' }, 404);
807:   }
808: 
809:   return jsonResponse({
810:     deployment,
811:     nextAction: nextActionForDeploymentError(deployment.error?.code),
812:   });
813: }
814: 
815: export async function handleGetWorkspaceDeploymentEvents(
816:   workspaceId: string,
817:   deploymentId: string,
818:   request: Request,
819:   env: Env
820: ): Promise<Response> {
821:   const workspaceMissing = await ensureWorkspaceExists(env, workspaceId);
822:   if (workspaceMissing) {
823:     return workspaceMissing;
824:   }
825: 
826:   const deployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
827:   if (!deployment) {
828:     return jsonResponse({ error: 'Deployment not found' }, 404);
829:   }
830: 
831:   const url = new URL(request.url);
832:   const from = Number.parseInt(url.searchParams.get('from') ?? '0', 10);
833:   const limit = Number.parseInt(url.searchParams.get('limit') ?? '500', 10);
834:   const fromExclusive = Number.isFinite(from) && from > 0 ? from : 0;
835:   const boundedLimit = Number.isFinite(limit) ? Math.max(1, Math.min(limit, 1000)) : 500;
836: 
837:   const events = await listWorkspaceDeploymentEvents(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId, fromExclusive, boundedLimit);
838:   return jsonResponse({ deploymentId, events });
839: }
840: 
841: export async function handleCancelWorkspaceDeployment(
842:   workspaceId: string,
843:   deploymentId: string,
844:   env: Env,
845:   ctx?: ExecutionContext
846: ): Promise<Response> {
847:   const workspaceMissing = await ensureWorkspaceExists(env, workspaceId);
848:   if (workspaceMissing) {
849:     return workspaceMissing;
850:   }
851: 
852:   const cancelResult = await cancelWorkspaceDeployment(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
853:   if (!cancelResult.deployment) {
854:     return jsonResponse({ error: 'Deployment not found' }, 404);
855:   }
856: 
857:   if (cancelResult.updated) {
858:     if (
859:       !env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOYS_QUEUE &&
860:       ctx &&
861:       cancelResult.deployment?.status === 'running' &&
862:       cancelResult.deployment.cancelRequestedAt
863:     ) {
864:       ctx.waitUntil(runWorkspaceDeploymentInlineWithRetries(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 2));
865:     }
866: 
867:     return jsonResponse({ deployment: cancelResult.deployment }, 202);
868:   }
869: 
870:   if (cancelResult.deployment.status === 'running' && cancelResult.deployment.cancelRequestedAt) {
871:     return jsonResponse({ deployment: cancelResult.deployment }, 202);
872:   }
873: 
874:   return jsonResponse(
875:     {
876:       error: 'Deployment is already terminal and cannot be cancelled',

1466: export async function processWorkspaceDeployment(env: Env, workspaceId: string, deploymentId: string): Promise<void> {

1468:   if (!claimed) {

1473:       } catch (reconcileError) {

1476:         }

1478:       return;
1479:     }
1480:

1483:       return;

1485: 
1486:     if (existing?.status === 'running') {
1487:       if (isRunningDeploymentStale(existing.startedAt)) {

1490:           return;

1500:           eventType: 'deployment_failed',

1504:           },

1506:         await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {

1513:       }
1514: 
1515:       if (existing.cancelRequestedAt) {
1516:         if (existing.providerDeploymentId) {
1517:           try {

1519:             const providerName = getWorkspaceDeployProviderName(requestPayload?.provider, env);
1520:             const provider = createWorkspaceDeployProvider(providerName, env);
1521:             const providerStatus = await provider.getDeploymentStatus(existing.providerDeploymentId);
1522: 
1523:             if (providerStatus.status === 'cancelled') {
1524:               await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'provider_cancelled');
1525:               return;
1526:             }
1527: 
1528:             if (providerStatus.status === 'succeeded') {

1551:               await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'failed', {

parts.text:
No blocking issues found.

- The inline retry path now correctly treats `"cancel requested while running"` as a defer/reconcile condition instead of force-cancelling locally, which avoids the prior race (`packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:1803`).
- The companion change in recovery (`packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:1774`) no longer auto-cancels a still-running deployment just because `cancelRequestedAt` is set.
- I ran the worker test suite (`pnpm -C packages/worker test`), and `workspace-deployment-runner` plus all other tests passed.
